question: Based on the unemployment rate map, which statement best describes the relationship between states?

options.A: The unemployment rate gap between Kansas and New York might exceed that between Vermont and Wyoming.
options.B: The unemployment rate differences are impossible to determine from this visualization.
options.C: Kansas and New York have similar unemployment rates.
options.D: All highlighted states have almost identical unemployment rates.

explanation: Kansas (12.8%) and New York (14.7%) have a 1.9% unemployment rate difference, while Vermont (3.7%) and Wyoming (4.4%) have only a 0.7% difference. However, the categorical color encoding groups Kansas and New York into the same color bin (10%+ range), making their large difference appear similar, while Vermont and Wyoming appear more different due to different color bins.
